description_long: This object is a long-barreled firearm with a dark metallic finish and a wooden grip. The barrel is cylindrical and extends significantly from the main body, with a front sight post visible at the muzzle. The frame is robust, featuring a prominent cylinder, indicating a revolver-style mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a curved trigger, while the grip is ergonomically shaped and made of polished wood. The overall design is classic, with a blend of metal and wood materials, and the object appears well-crafted with smooth, glossy surfaces. The firearm's details, such as the cylinder and hammer, are clearly defined, suggesting a high level of craftsmanship.
description: A long-barreled, dark metallic firearm with a wooden grip and a prominent cylinder, featuring a classic revolver design. The surfaces are smooth and glossy, with distinct metal and wood components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening, front sight post, and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long barrel, wooden grip, rounded trigger guard, and the visible cylinder.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden grip, the hammer, and the top of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the wooden grip and cylinder visible from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and cylindrical with a front sight post; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves or reinforcement
